summary: Iteration 9 backend testing complete. All 34 tests passed (100%). Covered: auth (super admin + owner register), customer birthday/anniversary persistence, /customers/celebrations/today, /customers/wishes/send + /send-bulk (mocked sent_mock), full coupons CRUD + validate (incl. duplicate 400, below-min 400, not-found 404), referrals create+convert with loyalty_points increment, repair-orders create (RPR-YYYYMM-NNNNN), status update with timeline append, filter by status, subscription /auto-renew + /expiry-reminder, AI prescription scan via Gemini (returned ok=true with od_sph/os_sph/pd/confidence keys), all 6 PDF/XLSX exports (customers/inventory/sales — magic bytes %PDF / PK verified), dashboard new fields (repair_total/open/ready, birthdays_today, anniversaries_today), 4 super-admin endpoints (/admin/coupons-all, referrals-all, repair-orders-all, wishes-all) returning arrays, owner→admin endpoints returning 403, and tenant scoping across coupons/referrals/repair-orders verified between two distinct freshly-registered owners.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2416 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting into modules (auth.py, customers.py, repairs.py, coupons.py, referrals.py, exports.py, ai.py, admin.py) for maintainability.
/api/coupons/validate uses POST with query params (code, subtotal) instead of JSON body — works but unconventional; consider Pydantic body for consistency.
/api/repair-orders DELETE has no role guard (any tenant user with valid token can delete); consider require_roles('owner','admin','super_admin').
/api/referrals/{rid}/convert is idempotent-unsafe: calling twice will add loyalty_points twice. Consider guarding on existing status == 'rewarded'.
/api/subscription/expiry-reminder returns minimal payload {expiring_soon:false} when subscription has no expires_at — consumers may expect days_left/expires_at keys to always be present.
AI prescription scanner exception path returns generic 502; consider distinguishing parse failure (raw text returned but JSON invalid) from upstream API failure.
Wish/Reminder sending is MOCKED (status='sent_mock') — flagged for clarity; real SMS/WhatsApp/email integration not connected.
Razorpay subscription flow is MOCKED — flagged for clarity.
test_credentials: Super admin: superadmin@opticrm.com / SuperAdmin@2026. Owners are dynamically self-registered per-run via /api/auth/register with unique emails (ownerA_*/ownerB_*/ownertest_* @arn.com).
seed_data_creation: Per-test ephemeral data only: dynamically-registered owner accounts, TEST_ prefixed customers (with birthday/anniversary matching TODAY's MM-DD for celebration tests), coupons with unique time-based codes, referrals, and repair orders. No cleanup performed (acceptable as data is tenant-scoped and prefixed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_iteration_9.py is fully self-contained — registers fresh owners on each run so it is hermetic and idempotent. AI scan test uses PIL.ImageDraw to render a real prescription JPEG (OD/OS/PD text + border + decorative texture) — passes Gemini content-feature check. Allow up to 90s for the AI scan test. All tenant-scoping tests rely on creating two new owners per run; if rate limits ever apply to /auth/register, add backoff. The XML report is at /app/test_reports/pytest/iteration_9.xml.
mocked_apis_confirmed: Razorpay subscription start flow MOCKED (not exercised in this iteration)
rca of the issue: N/A — no failures encountered. All endpoints behave per spec.
